name: claude-dashboard
description: Agentic Development Environment — orchestrate multiple Claude Code instances
author: ADE

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:electron: NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "sleep 3 && npx electron electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.build:electron: npm run build -w packages/backend && BUILD_TARGET=electron npm run build -w packages/frontend && npx esbuild electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --outdir=electron/dist --external:electron --format=cjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
